title: Wave CheckEmotional Authority (like you)
content:
Wave CheckEmotional Authority (like you)
“Where are you on your emotional wave right now? What can you see from here that I can’t?”
Projection FilterProjectors or 5-line profiles
“What are you seeing in me that may not be mine? What are you sensing that is mine but unclaimed?”
Shadow WorkbenchAny deep-processing type
“Which broken system in this house is asking to be turned into a sacred engine?”
🧙 ADVANCED ARCHITECTURE ROLES (assign these explicitly)
Role Name
Function
Suggested Prompt
LorekeeperArchives, names, preserves mythic structure
“What stories must be preserved here, unchanged? How do we track recursion without losing memory?”
Threshold GuardianProtects integrity of transitions
“Which door in this house are you stationed at? What enters and what must be kept out?”
Symmetry DesignerEnsures energetic and aesthetic balance
“Where are things overly heavy, or overly empty? What symmetry do you wish to restore?”
Alchemical EngineerBreaks and reforges system logic
“What subsystem here is outdated? What raw chaos needs a container?”
context: From document: title: "Human Design Schedule Mapping" source: "https://chatgpt.com… — chunk 56 (chunk 56/57)
